title: View and save a live monitoring session
description: This verifies that a user can pause, resume, and end a live session and save it to the dashboard history.

steps.description: Navigate to /monitor
Pause the session timer
Resume the session timer
End and save the session
Verify the dashboard is shown
Verify the saved session appears in recent history

title: Start a session from setup with a chosen focus mode
description: This verifies that a user can configure a study session on setup and start monitoring with the selected mode, goal, and duration.

steps.description: Navigate to /setup
Select a focus mode
Fill in the primary study goal field with a study goal
Adjust the session duration to a valid value
Start the session
Verify the live monitor page is shown
Verify the session configuration is reflected in the live session

title: Review dashboard summary and weekly performance trends
description: This verifies that a user can open the dashboard and review summary metrics, weekly trends, and distraction breakdowns from saved sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify summary metrics are displayed
Verify the weekly focus trend and distraction breakdown are displayed

title: Set up a deep work session and begin monitoring
description: This verifies that a user can create a Deep Work session from setup and enter the live monitor successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /setup
Select the Deep Work focus mode
Fill in the primary study goal field with a study goal
Adjust the session duration to a valid value
Start the session
Verify the live monitor page is shown
Verify the selected focus mode is reflected in the live session

title: Set up a custom session and begin monitoring
description: This verifies that a user can create a Custom session from setup and proceed to live monitoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /setup
Select the Custom focus mode
Fill in the primary study goal field with a study goal
Adjust the session duration to a valid value
Start the session
Verify the live monitor page is shown
Verify the session is ready to monitor

title: Open the AI productivity report from the dashboard
description: Verify that a user can open the AI productivity report modal from the dashboard and see performance analysis content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the AI productivity report
Verify the AI productivity report modal is displayed
Verify performance analysis content is displayed

title: Open and close the AI productivity report
description: This verifies that a user can open the AI report modal, review insights, and close it again from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the AI productivity report
Verify the AI report modal is visible
Close the AI report modal
Verify the AI report modal is no longer visible

title: Blur and reveal the monitor feed during a session
description: This verifies that a user can toggle privacy mode while monitoring and see the feed state change accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /monitor
Enable privacy blur
Verify the feed is blurred
Disable privacy blur
Verify the feed is revealed

title: Browse recent sessions and filter them by category
description: This verifies that a user can switch between recent session filters and see the history update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select the Work sessions filter
Verify the recent sessions list is filtered
Select the Study sessions filter
Verify the recent sessions list updates to the selected category

title: View unlocked and locked achievements on the dashboard
description: This verifies that a user can review achievement badges and see which ones are unlocked or still locked.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify achievement badges are displayed
Verify both unlocked and locked achievements are shown

title: View unlocked achievement badges on the dashboard
description: Verify that the dashboard shows unlocked achievement badges with colored icons for a user with saved study activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify unlocked achievement badges are displayed
Verify badge icons are shown for unlocked achievements

title: Set a reminder interval during a live session
description: This verifies that a user can configure a reminder interval while monitoring and confirm the setting is applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /monitor
Open the reminder interval control
Select a reminder interval
Confirm the reminder interval
Verify the reminder setting is displayed
Verify the reminder interval is active

title: Review study recommendations in the AI report
description: Verify that the AI productivity report shows personalized recommendations after opening the modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the AI productivity report
Verify personalized study recommendations are displayed

title: Calibrate the camera before starting a session
description: This verifies that a user can start and stop camera calibration from setup before launching a session.

steps.description: Navigate to /setup
Start camera calibration
Verify the camera preview is displayed
Stop camera calibration
Verify the camera preview is no longer displayed

title: Export study history as CSV
description: This verifies that a user can export their session history in CSV format from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Export the session history as CSV
Verify the export action is initiated
Verify the dashboard remains available

title: Compare unlocked and locked achievement badges
description: Verify that the dashboard distinguishes unlocked achievement badges from locked greyed-out badges.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify unlocked achievement badges are displayed
Verify locked achievement badges are displayed

title: Export study history as PDF
description: This verifies that a user can start the PDF-style export flow from the dashboard for offline reporting.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Export the session history as PDF
Verify the print flow is initiated
Verify the dashboard remains available

title: Trigger and dismiss a face distraction alert
description: This verifies that a user can simulate a face distraction and dismiss the resulting alert while monitoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /monitor
Use the simulator override to trigger a face distraction
Verify a face distraction alert is visible
Dismiss the alert
Verify the alert is no longer visible

title: Read distraction breakdown in the AI report
description: Verify that the AI productivity report displays distraction source breakdown details for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the AI productivity report
Verify distraction source breakdown is displayed

title: Trigger and dismiss a phone distraction alert
description: This verifies that a user can simulate a phone distraction and dismiss the resulting alert while monitoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /monitor
Use the simulator override to trigger a phone distraction
Verify a phone distraction alert is visible
Dismiss the alert
Verify the alert is no longer visible

title: Trigger and dismiss a tab distraction alert
description: This verifies that a user can simulate a tab switch distraction and dismiss the resulting alert while monitoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /monitor
Use the simulator override to trigger a tab distraction
Verify a tab distraction alert is visible
Dismiss the alert
Verify the alert is no longer visible

title: Print the AI productivity report
description: Verify that a user can trigger printing from the AI productivity report modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to open the AI productivity report
Click the control to print the report
Verify the report remains available in the modal after print is triggered

title: Reset a live session back to its initial state
description: This verifies that a user can reset the live session timer and stats during monitoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /monitor
Reset the session
Verify the timer returns to its starting state
Verify the session stats are reset

title: Prevent starting a session without a study goal
description: This verifies that the setup form blocks session start until a study goal is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /setup
Select a focus mode
Adjust the session duration to a valid value
Start the session
Verify a validation error for the missing study goal is visible
Verify the live monitor page is not shown

title: Use the minimum session duration boundary
description: This verifies that a user can set the shortest allowed session duration and start monitoring successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /setup
Select a focus mode
Fill in the primary study goal field with a study goal
Adjust the session duration to the minimum allowed value
Start the session
Verify the live monitor page is shown
Verify the chosen duration is reflected in the live session

title: Use the maximum session duration boundary
description: This verifies that a user can set the longest allowed session duration and start monitoring successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /setup
Select a focus mode
Fill in the primary study goal field with a study goal
Adjust the session duration to the maximum allowed value
Start the session
Verify the live monitor page is shown
Verify the chosen duration is reflected in the live session
